name: faiths-mcp
description: World religions & faiths MCP: what the major traditions actually believe and practice — Christianity, Islam, Judaism (incl. Kabbalah), Buddhism, Hinduism, Sikhism, and more — plus their shared roots, key differences, and honest, respectful, non-preachy comparison. Describes faiths from the outside, evenhandedly; never proselytizes or ranks them. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
